seoTitle: Peregian Springs vs Perseverance — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Peregian Springs and Perseverance. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Peregian Springs vs Perseverance: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Peregian Springs and Perseverance.
heading: Peregian Springs vs Perseverance — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Peregian Springs, Queensland and Perseverance, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Peregian Springs has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Perseverance (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Peregian Springs or Perseverance safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Peregian Springs has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Perseverance scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Peregian Springs scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Perseverance scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Peregian Springs or Perseverance?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Peregian Springs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
